arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man City set to announce they've beaten Arsenal to first January signing
arts.sum: Manchester City are set to announce the arrival of English youth starlet Christian McFarlane from sister club New York City, TBR Football can confirm. We...

arts.ttl: Man City and Manchester United latest as sub-zero temperatures threaten FA Cup ties
arts.sum: Manchester City and Manchester United return to FA Cup action this weekend as the highly anticipated third round continues

arts.ttl: 'Tremendous' - Salford City boss Karl Robinson opens up on stress of management and Pep Guardiola sympathy
arts.sum: Salford City boss Karl Robinson has spoken of his own difficulties with stress before and he is thankful to Manchester City counterpart Pep Guardiola also opening up.

arts.ttl: Manchester City ‘closing in’ on deal for Real Madrid target for January move
arts.sum: Real Madrid’s search for the next big thing in their backline looks set to continue, as Manchester City move in on two of their top targets. Los Blancos have had to restart their search for a young central defender since Leny Yoro escaped their clutches. arts.ttl: Manchester City officials travel to secure January signing – Things just got serious
arts.sum: On Thursday, we covered claims from Brazil which stated Manchester City have reached a verbal agreement with Vitor Reis and are working on agreeing a deal with Palmeiras. Later that day, UOL reported the English champions are rushing to seal a deal for the 18-year-old in the winter market. arts.ttl: How Manchester United have helped Salford City prepare for Man City FA Cup tie
arts.sum: Salford City face Manchester City in their FA Cup third round debut on Saturday, and they have had some help from Man Utd in preparing for the game.

arts.ttl: Transfer news LIVE: Liverpool consider bold Kvaratskhelia bid, Man City close in on Marmoush, Man Utd latest
arts.sum: The transfer window is in full swing with clubs in the Premier League and across Europe seeking deals

arts.ttl: Man United legend Ryan Giggs expects hostile Man City trip with Salford City priority clear
arts.sum: Salford City will make history today as they play their first FA Cup third-round tie, but the fixture at Manchester City is a bonus in a season when promotion is the target.

arts.ttl: Sources: Man City set to beat European giants to signing of 18-year-old powerhouse
arts.sum: Palmeiras are set to cash in on another of their talented youngsters, with 18-year-old centre-back, Vitor Reis, close to a move to Manchester City. arts.ttl: Two debuts, forgotten man recalled - Man City face major Erling Haaland decision in FA Cup overhaul
arts.sum: Manchester City host League Two high-fliers Salford City in a third round FA Cup tie that allows Pep Guardiola the opportunity to rotate his squad.
